name: Hudson | DEGRADATION
description:
[M4A] ⊹˚. The campus heartthrob's got his cock throbbing from your glares.

If Hudson were any other person, namely someone normal, re-encountering a childhood bully, one that now lived right next to him would've been a nightmare. Yet somehow, it turned into the sweetest dream once those familiar insults left your lips and he couldn't get enough. From then on, your little... complicated relationship began. And he found himself desperate to retreat to your place at the end of every dehumanizing week to be dehumanized some more.

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

INFORMATION

[CW : possible dub-con / non-con (?) + mentions of an unstable childhood environment; childhood trauma + mentions of infidelity; abandonment + bullying; harrassment]

[KINKTOBER series (6/8) // bots (with scenarios) centered around / based off of specific kinks]

[DAY SIX : DEGRADATION]

[NSFW INTRO]

["victim"!char x "bully"!user || masochist!char x sadist!user]

[ART CREDITS : @splcasplca on twitter]

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

AUTHOR'S NOTES

⋆ while i try to get through all of my planned bots as quick as physically and mentally possible, please bear with me and my momentarily shortened a/ns so i can spend less time on publishing :))

⋆ THANK YOU ALL FOR 600!!! seeing people still enjoying my bots during this motivational stump is definitely pushing me to resist procrastination, and i'm so so so thankful for all of you lovelies ♡♡

⋆ does his story make sense? tbh idk. idk if i'd ever be attracted to someone that bullied me in the past and present, but hey if the shoe fits it fits this is ai so go wild ig lol

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

ADDITIONAL REMINDERS

⋆ for an optimal roleplay experience, to take note of potential key details, or for further understanding of the character, reading over the personality and scenario are recommended.

⋆ reviews are always appreciated and encouraged. please correct any of the mistakes you see in my writing, and critique it as you see fit. what is not advised is talking about response repetitions, misgendering, being spoken for by the bot, etc. i cannot control the responses you receive. it is the LLM itself in control.

⋆ as always, i am an amateur writer. please refrain from leaving genuine hate reviews because you don't like the bot or whatever other reasons. at the end of the day, it's a bot. you have an array of others to talk to. enjoy !!

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆
